proven.claim: PROVEN: Guard Narrowing at clamp is prevented (CEGAR-refined encoding)
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: guard-narrowing
; LINE: 25
; VIOLATION: Guard Narrowing at clamp
; REASON: The original encoding was missing two constraints: (1) an early return must
; prevent code_after from being reached (guard_returns=1 => code_after_reached=0),
; and (2) the violation scenario requires the guard to actually fire (guard_condition=1).
; Without these, Z3 satisfied the query via the benign normal path (guard_condition=0,
; code falls through to `return value`), which is not a bug at all.
(declare-const guard_condition Int)
(declare-const guard_returns Int)
(declare-const code_after_reached Int)
(assert (=> (= guard_condition 1) (= guard_returns 1)))
(assert (=> (= guard_returns 0) (= code_after_reached 1)))
(assert (=> (= guard_returns 1) (= code_after_reached 0)))
(assert (= guard_condition 1))
(assert (= code_after_reached 1))
(check-sat)
proven.reason: The original encoding was missing two constraints: (1) an early return must prevent code_after from being reached (guard_returns=1 => code_after_reached=0), and (2) the violation scenario requires the guard to actually fire (guard_condition=1). Without these, Z3 satisfied the query via the benign normal path (guard_condition=0, code falls through to `return value`), which is not a bug at all.
proven.judge_note: cegar-flipped: violation became proof after tightening encoding
